dIsCussIon
In the observed period, the annual incidence rates of
ADHD diagnosis in Slovenia increased logarithmically and
the prevalence rates increased linearly. The annual inci-
dence increased 1.5-fold from 1997 to 2000 and 2.5-fold
from 1997 to 2003. The prevalence of ADHD diagnosis in-
creased 3.5-fold from 2000 to 2012 and 2.5-fold from 2000
to 2006. The increase in the incidence and prevalence in
